title: Your Oxen subscription is active! 🎉
subject: Your Oxen subscription is active! 🎉
success_message: Thank you for updating your Oxen subscription! 🎉 All your benefits are now active again, and you can enjoy them fully.
reminder_message: 📌 Remember to maintain sufficient funds in your account to ensure a smooth renewal next time.
closing_message: Thank you for your commitment, and welcome back to the Oxen active users!
